BASELINE_SCHEMA.title: Thinking in Systems
BASELINE_SCHEMA.author: Donella Meadows
BASELINE_SCHEMA.tldr: A primer on systems thinking — feedback loops, leverage points, and why isolated interventions usually fail.

quotes.text: A system is more than the sum of its parts.
